title: A different kind of Oedipus Complex
display_title: A different kind of Oedipus Complex
wikitext:
[]: A different kind of Oedipus Complex...             Quote Post by Phaze » Fri Jul 16, 2004 3:40 pm Okay, first of all, to avoid any criticism, this is all just random speculation. My thoughts have no effect on the world of Eva, nor should they took mean-spirited (incest is a touchy subject). Rei, technically, is Shinji's sister. My basis for this claim is the process of how to clone an organism. Firstly, you need a fertilized egg, what they do, however, is inject the egg with genetic material of the person they want to clone. Who's egg was used in Eva? Yui makes sense to me, with Gendo's help. I don't believe any light is ever revealed on the details of Rei's creation, so in terms of what's canon, it's obviously not true. I still found worth mentioning.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Fri Jul 16, 2004 4:28 pm I think they said in either the anime or the manga that the genetic data was in fact Yui's... or maybe it's one of those things thats become Psudo-Cannon like naming Touji's sister Mari and stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Fri Jul 16, 2004 8:59 pm isnt the DNA also part angel? but i agree with the idea...though it might have been hard to get the eggs from yui...maybe from someone else? the egg doesnt matter...what matters is the genetic material injected into it...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jul 16, 2004 10:15 pm Rei's origins are largely contested. The general consensus is that Rei was the unintended byproduct of the failed salvage attempt of Yui Ikari. This is confirmed by dialogue in the series, as well as other sources such as the Red Cross Book. She is not a clone in the sense you are thinking. Rei was an accident, and was later found to be of use and purpose. It is my belief that Rei was created from the body of Lilith, just as Lilith's mass was used to create Eva Unit 01. When Yui was taken into the Eva, her DNA in some way transfered between the Eva Unit and Lilith, who at that time most likely were still attached. The DNA cause Lilith to produce the Rei vessels which are seen about her mid-section.

[]: Lilith, Yui, and Rei             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Fri Jul 16, 2004 10:58 pm So if Rei was created from the body of Lilith, because of some kind of DNA transfer from the Eva, What does that make her to Shinji? Sister? Mother? are their genes the same of similliar? Does that make the whole Rei Shinji thing Incest, or just a little wierd because she looks just like his mother? Also, I thought the Eva's where cloned from Adam, not Lilith. And even if they were cloned from Lilith, How does a Dna transfer take place? Eva unit-01's body is sperate from Lilith's right?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr.Guy » Fri Jul 16, 2004 11:19 pm All the Evas except for Unit 01 are cloned from Adam. Unit 01 is cloned from Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sun Jul 18, 2004 7:07 pm then she's half of lillith and half yui.,...

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Sun Jul 18, 2004 7:12 pm sadsadshinji wrote: then she's half of lillith and half yui.,...

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Jul 18, 2004 9:50 pm All DNA aside she looks like Shinji's dead mother. Its a bit weird to date a girl that looks like mommy.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Jul 19, 2004 2:34 am i heard that a lot of people look for their mother in people they date...or maybe i forgot some part of it...but that way...Rei would be a real canidate...lol

[]:             Quote Post by Jamie the Great » Mon Mar 19, 2007 7:39 pm Okay, what about Kaworu too? I don't know who's DNA he was cloned from but when Ritsuko's mom first sees Rei she says that she reminds her of someone and then says "Yui." And on flashes a picture of Kaworu. So if Kaworu was made from Yui's DNA then that would make him like Rei, and Shinji seems to have a...ahem, connection with him. And there is the scene in EoE with Shinji is laying Naked with Rei on top of him... and the whole 'going inside the entry plug of the Eva' and the Eva has his mothers soul in it.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Mar 19, 2007 7:49 pm Jamie the Great wrote: Okay, what about Kaworu too? I don't know who's DNA he was cloned from but when Ritsuko's mom first sees Rei she says that she reminds her of someone and then says "Yui." And on flashes a picture of Kaworu. So if Kaworu was made from Yui's DNA then that would make him like Rei, and Shinji seems to have a...ahem, connection with him.

[]:             Quote Post by Jamie the Great » Mon Mar 19, 2007 9:15 pm Ornette wrote: Jamie the Great wrote: Okay, what about Kaworu too? I don't know who's DNA he was cloned from but when Ritsuko's mom first sees Rei she says that she reminds her of someone and then says "Yui." And on flashes a picture of Kaworu. So if Kaworu was made from Yui's DNA then that would make him like Rei, and Shinji seems to have a...ahem, connection with him.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Mar 19, 2007 9:19 pm Jamie the Great wrote: No, the scene where you see Kaworu is when she very first meets Rei, and asks Gendo if Rei was his kid. That part, before she srangles her

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Mon Mar 19, 2007 9:47 pm Ornette wrote: Naoko doesn't realize who Rei reminded her of until Rei calls her an old hag.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Mar 19, 2007 10:00 pm slothen wrote: Ornette wrote: Naoko doesn't realize who Rei reminded her of until Rei calls her an old hag.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Mon Mar 19, 2007 10:03 pm this is perhaps due to translation error/dubbing but in my version it says something like, "the actual data was my mother's but I can still pick her brains." or something like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 19, 2007 11:21 pm slothen wrote: this is perhaps due to translation error/dubbing but in my version it says something like, "the actual data was my mother's but I can still pick her brains." or something like that.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Mon Mar 19, 2007 11:42 pm Reichu you have no idea how fucking scary that is given your angry green avatar. :oops: :oops: so the actual translation at no point links the salvage experiment Naoko? damn. I wonder how they did it without an Akagi considering Ritsuko seems to be Official Head of Technical Voodoo-Bullshit director. [btw i have much love for technical voodoo-bullshit. Episode 13 is one of my favorites.]

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 19, 2007 11:57 pm slothen wrote: Reichu you have no idea how fucking scary that is given your angry green avatar.
